title: AI vaults on Hyperliquid with @neuravaults
summary_title: AI agents optimize stablecoin yield on Hyperliquid, outperforming lending markets by 41%
summary_description: Neuravaults launches agentic vaults on Hyperliquid EVM. Deposit USDT, earn optimized yield across lending protocols with no leverage or liquidation risk.

key_moments.label: Mainnet launch coincides with Hyperliquid UAE event and AMA
Hamza introduces himself: ex-Polygon head of DeFi, dropped out of NYU to go all-in crypto post-FTX
Neuravaults building agentic vaults because directional AI trading is too early
Earlier experiment with plain-English trading strategies saw $1-2M volume but AI proved too probabilistic
User deposits $2K, already earning yield incrementally—compares experience to Anchor Protocol simplicity
AI forecasts impact of large deposits on pool APY before allocating capital across lending markets
Hamza: agents handling money is what smart contracts were 4-5 years ago—massive untapped potential
Future: vault factory model lets anyone create custom DeFi strategies using Neuravaults infrastructure and agents

pull_quote: Agents handling money is what smart contracts were four or five years ago. Massive untapped potential.
